title: Canopy-managed coordinator prompt
rationale: Replaced hard-coded getCoordinatorSystemPrompt() with canopy-cached version for versioned, iterable prompt management. SessionStart hook runs cn render coordinator-full to .claude/.coordinator-prompt-cache. Function reads cache with fallback to hard-coded default.

title: Docker os-eco integration
rationale: Added os-eco tools (cn, mulch, sd, ov) to Dockerfile via bun add -g. Volume mounts in docker-compose.yml expose .canopy/, .mulch/, .seeds/, .overstory/, .claude/ to /app/. Tools work in container, hooks can run, cache file readable.
